SystemStatus.Description: Test failure, system status not correct

IdleRPMConditionsNotCorrect.Description: Conditions not correct to test Idle RPM

BoostPressureConditionsNotCorrect.Description: Conditions not correct to test Boost Pressure

AISIdleConditions.Description: Vehicle not at proper conditions for Idle AIS testing

MDSEngineRPMOutOfRange.Description: Engine RPM out of range during MDS test

TimeoutWaitingForVehicleSpeed.Description: Timeout waiting for vehicle speed to be in range

TLCIdleConditions.Description: Vehicle not at idle state to setup TLC Easy Learn

TLCSpeedTimeout.Description: Timeout waiting for vehicle in TLC speed range

TLCClosedThrottleTimeout.Description: Timeout waiting for closed throttle to begin TLC test

TLCTestTimeout.Description: Timeout waiting for TLC test to complete

MapSensorIdleRPMNotCorrect.Description: Idle RPM out of range for required test conditions

MapSensorThrotlleNotCorrect.Description: Throttle out of range for required test conditions

InitialTpsThrotlleNotCorrect.Description: Initial throttle out of range for required test conditions

ModuleUpdateCommunicationFailure.Description: Communication Failure updating EOL status registers

SetOKToShipFail.Description: Failure setting module to OK To Ship

SetNotOKToShipFail.Description: Failure setting module to Not OK to Ship

StartHydraulicCoolingFanFailed.Description: Communication failure starting hydraulic cooling fan

StopHydraulicCoolingFanFailed.Description: Communication failure stoping hydraulic cooling fan

SetupDynamicLID.Description: Communication failure setting up dynamic LID

IncorrectModuleType.Description: Module type does not match broadcast

VINMismatch.Description: VIN programmed in PCM does not match Broadcast

PartNumberMismatch.Description: Part Number programmed in PCM does not match Broadcast

FieldModeNotSet.Description: Failure setting module to Field Mode

EngineIdleRPMOutOfRange.Description: Idle RPM is out of parameter range

BoostPressureOutOfRange.Description: Boost Pressure out of range at Idle

VaccuumLeak.Description: AIS position incorrect, possible vaccuum leak

BrakeSwitchFail.Description: Failed to see Brake switch On and Off

BrakeSwitchOnFail.Description: Failed to see Brake switch On

BrakeSwitchOffFail.Description: Failed to see Brake switch Off

ParkNeutralSwitchFail.Description: Failed to see Park/Neutral switch On and Off

ParkNeutralSwitchOnFail.Description: Failed to see Park/Neutral switch On

ParkNeutralSwitchOffFail.Description: Failed to see Park/Neutral switch Off

ClutchSwitchFail.Description: Failed to see Clutch switch On and Off

ClutchSwitchOnFail.Description: Failed to see Clutch switch On

ClutchSwitchOffFail.Description: Failed to see Clutch switch Off

DeltaTPSFail.Description: TPS failed to give required voltage change

RedundantBrakeSwitchFail.Description: Failed to see Redundant Brake switch On and Off

RedundantBrakeSwitchOnFail.Description: Failed to see Redundant Brake switch On

RedundantBrakeSwitchOffFail.Description: Failed to see Redundant Brake switch Off

StartModuleKeepAliveFail.Description: Failed to start keep alive thread

StopModuleKeepAliveFail.Description: Failed to stop the keep alive thread

ClutchUpstopSwitchFail.Description: Failed to see Clutch Upstop switch On and Off

ClutchUpstopSwitchOnFail.Description: Failed to see Clutch Upstop switch On

ClutchUpstopSwitchOffFail.Description: Failed to see Clutch Upstop switch Off

ClutchOffUpstopOnFail.Description: Failed to see Clutch Off switch and Upstop On switch at the same time

EOLStatusRegisterCheck.Description: EOL Status registers not set properly at end of test

EOLStatusRegister1Fail.Description: Rolls failures recorded in status register 1

EOLStatusRegister2Fail.Description: Rolls failures recorded in status register 2

MisfireOnline.Description: Misfire online failure, misfires recorded in module

FuelRichLean.Description: Fuel Rich - Lean value out of range

OdometerRAMNotSynchronized.Description: Odometer RAM does not match odometer EEPROM

OdometerLimitExceeded.Description: Current odometer exceeds In-Plant limit. Reprogram In-Plant limit.

MDSV8IdleTimeout.Description: Timeout waiting for V4 state to become inactive at idle

MDSV8AtSpeedTimeout.Description: Timeout waiting for V4 state to become inactive at idle

MDSV4Timeout.Description: Timeout waiting for V4 state to become active

TLCSpeedOutOfRange.Description: Vehicle speed out of range before TLC complete

SpeedRationality.Description: Vehicle speed does not match roller speed

SpeedRationalitySpeedFailure.Description: Speed out of range for speed rationality test

EGRAirFlow.Description: MAF intake air flow decrease not sufficient during EGR test

UplineTestsNotComplete.Description: Upline tests failed or not complete

InFieldMode.Description: Module in Field Mode, expected Plant mode

FieldModeComplementWrong.Description: Ones Complement of Field Mode incorrect, module may be in Field Mode

NVLDUplineFail.Description: Upline NVLD Test Failed or Not Complete

TPS1TPS2Failure.Description: TPS1 and TPS2 value out of range

TurboOverboostConditions.Description: Turbo overboost test condition not possible

SwitchMonitorSwitchTestFailure.Description: Failed to See One or More Switches

OnlineTestsNotComplete.Description: Online tests not complete prior to rolls
